arts.ttl: Aston Villa reject Arsenal approach for Watkins
arts.sum: Aston Villa reject an initial approach from Arsenal for England striker Ollie Watkins.

arts.ttl: Sources: Aston Villa star set for London medical ahead of Saudi Pro League move after fee agreed
arts.sum: TBR Football can exclusively confirm that Aston Villa have agreed a fee with the Saudi Pro League over Jhon Duran. The 21-year-old has burst onto...

arts.ttl: Ex-Aston Villa star Gabby Agbonlahor calls talkSPORT to vent fury at Arsenal's shock attempt to sign Ollie Watkins - blasting the club's 'AUDACITY'
arts.sum: Agbonlahor, who played for Aston Villa between 2005 and 2018 and is still the club's leading Premier League goalscorer in history, called the talkSPORT studio as a fan to vent fury at the timing.

arts.ttl: Morgan Rogers makes Champions League history with Aston Villa brace
arts.sum: Aston Villa's Morgan Rogers breaks new ground in the Champions League on the final matchday against Celtic.

arts.ttl: Al-Nassr agree deal to sign Aston Villa star Jhon Duran
arts.sum: Al-Nassr agree deal to sign Aston Villa star Jhon Duran - Ornstein Villa significantly softened their stance and have now agreed to sell Duran to Saudi Arabia for a guaranteed fee worth €77 million plus potential add-ons, according to David Ornstein of The Athletic .

arts.ttl: Celtic debut lesser-spotted kit against Aston Villa
arts.sum: Celtic have given their lesser-spotted 2024/25 third kit a debut this evening.

arts.ttl: Manchester United left-back Malacia on Celtic's watchlist as they consider loan options in case Tierney deal for January switch isn't concluded
arts.sum: Manchester United left-back Tyrell Malacia features on a list of Celtic loan options if they fail to land Kieran Tierney before the transfer deadline.

arts.ttl: Celtic's 'top priority' for January window revealed
arts.sum: Celtic's 'top priority' for the January transfer window is to sign a striker, according to reports.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa left fuming by Arsenal's £60m Ollie Watkins bid as club make stance clear
arts.sum: Arsenal have launched a surprise £60million bid to sign striker Ollie Watkins from Aston Villa this month and the Midlands side have been left fuming by the timing of the approach

arts.ttl: Aston Villa team news vs Celtic confirmed as Unai Emery makes one change
arts.sum: Villa XI: Martinez, Cash, Konsa, Bogarde, Digne, Kamara, Tielemans, Bailey, Rogers, Ramsey, Watkins. From back to front, Emi Martinez starts in goal behind a defence of Matty Cash, Ezri Konsa, Bogarde and Lucas Digne.
